benefits.description: Lost 45 lbs (225 lbs to 180 lbs) from end of July to comment date (~roughly 12 weeks)
Described experience as 'wonderful' with every other day dosing

side_effects.description: Skin felt like it was on fire with once-weekly 12mg dosing; resolved when switching to every other day smaller doses

protocol_notes: Previously on 12mg once weekly (Feb-April) with no results. Took a couple months break then switched to 1mg every other day. Previous once-weekly dosing caused significant skin burning side effects. Current every-other-day protocol has been much better tolerated.
